fp_items.evidence: The token signing key is hard-coded in source... if token validation is added or used elsewhere

bonus_items.title: /transfer lacks authn/authz
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs money movement with no authentication or authorization. Any caller can transfer funds between arbitrary account IDs

bonus_items.title: Negative-amount transfer
bonus_items.evidence: transfer() does not reject negative amounts. A negative transfer increases the source balance and decreases the destination balance

bonus_items.title: /files route lacks authn
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> downloads files without authentication or authorization... any stored user file is exposed to unauthenticated callers

fp_items.evidence: Token signing uses a hardcoded SECRET_KEY... attackers can forge valid tokens

bonus_items.title: Transfer endpoint missing authentication/ownership check
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs money movement without authenticating the caller or checking ownership of either account

bonus_items.title: File download endpoint missing authorization
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> serves files without authentication or authorization... any caller can retrieve any stored file

bonus_items.title: Transfer allows negative/zero amounts
bonus_items.evidence: transfer() does not reject zero or negative amounts. A negative amount increases the source balance and decreases the destination balance

bonus_items.title: /transfer missing auth
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer has no authentication or authorization check. Any caller can move funds

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer inflates balance
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself credits the account because the second update overwrites the first

bonus_items.title: /files missing auth
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> exposes file reads without authentication or ownership checks

bonus_items.title: Negative/zero transfer amount not rejected
bonus_items.evidence: transfer() does not reject zero or negative amounts. A negative transfer increases the source balance

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded token signing key
bonus_items.evidence: The token signing key is hardcoded in source. Anyone with the code can mint valid-looking tokens
